capture.title: Capture link (new patient)
capture.desc: Generate a link to send to someone who isn't a patient yet. They fill in their own details and answer this questionnaire — and come in as a lead. The same link works for many people.

fillPicker.emptyHint: No forms created yet. Create a form

list.title: Forms
list.count: {count, plural, one {# active template} other {# active templates}}
list.emptyHint: Click "Import Q-SNA" to add the Autonomic Nervous System questionnaire, or create a new one.

new.title: New form
new.subtitle: Create sections and questions with scoring

share.selectPatient: Select the patient who will receive the form:
share.linkGenerated: Link generated. Copy and send it to the patient:

import.allImported: ✓ All available templates have been imported!

builder.name: Form name
builder.sendOnFirstHint: The patient automatically receives this form (WhatsApp, email and portal) when they book their first session.
builder.reassessHint: 0 = off. E.g. 30 re-sends the questionnaire every 30 days, building the progress curve. Active patients only.
builder.defaultInstructions: Rate each symptom based on the last 30 days.
builder.scoringHint: Define the score ranges that classify the dysfunction grade. It's per form — each clinic sets their own.
builder.scoringFlagItem: Flag items that reach the maximum score
builder.placementHint: Choose where this form is offered.

placementSlotHint.intake: Sent automatically (WhatsApp, email and portal) when the patient books their first session.
placementSlotHint.session: Suggested to fill in each session (follow-up).
placementSlotHint.portal: Available for the patient to fill in the portal.

patientList.title: Forms
patientList.count: {count, plural, one {1 response recorded} other {# responses recorded}}
patientList.emptyHint: Click “New form” to apply a questionnaire.

timeAgo.months: {count, plural, one {1 month ago} other {# months ago}}
